title: Twilio integration for SMS, how to enter custom Sender ID

posts.author: tonydee (Antonis Despotakis)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello, we have set up the Twilio integration for sending SMS messages via Monday automations.

In the API there is a Alphanumeric Sender ID which can used to customize the name of the SMS sender.

There seems to be no way to use this parameter in the existing Twilio app, has someone found how this is supposed to function?
